BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: Exploitation requires access to the Apex codebase or calling exposed methods.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: Can be exploited by any caller of the vulnerable method.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The impact is limited to the same application scope.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Core issue: allows external mutation of internal state, affecting logic/behavior.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: Does not directly affect system uptime or responsiveness.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Exploitation requires access to the Apex codebase or calling exposed methods.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Can be exploited by any caller of the vulnerable method.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Core issue: allows external mutation of internal state, affecting logic/behavior

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Does not directly affect system uptime or responsiveness..
